meaning: n.运货马车,一种撬vi.以运货马车运vt.用马车运载
examples: A dray is a type of horse - drawn vehicle.
The trader pushing small dray is selling watermelon.
But, according to Philip Dray, this was not always or necessarily so.
Ironworkers, Taylor thought, were as dumb as dray horses, and ought to be dealt with accordingly.
Dray Horse Yard at the Brewery Square development in Dorchester was opened, along with a new multiplex cinema.
